SNPkit 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Getting started with SNPkit

SNPkit: S4 tools for reading and organizing genetic data

Source: R/SNPkit-package.R
SNPkit.Rd

Utilities for reading, cleaning, summarizing, and modeling SNP genotype data.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://viniciusjunqueira.github.io/SNPkit/
